Restriction: Permission of instructor.

SOCY610 Logic of Social Inquiry (3 Credits)

An introductory course on the fundamental issues that arise in the design, execution, analysis, and writing stages of the research process. The course is designed to help first-year graduate students begin their transition from a consumer to a producer of social research. Restriction: Restricted to Sociology graduate students.

Credit Only Granted for. SOCY699D or SOCY610.
